special_mechanics.name: Motorcycle Control
special_mechanics.description: Player controls a motorcycle racer with brake, accelerate, and attack inputs. Can punch, backhand, or kick nearby opponents.

special_mechanics.name: Nitrous Oxide Boost
special_mechanics.description: Certain bikes equipped with nitrous oxide charges that provide burst of speed when player taps acceleration button twice

special_mechanics.name: Stamina System
special_mechanics.description: Racer has stamina meter that depletes during fights. Running out of stamina ejects racer from bike.

special_mechanics.name: Bike Ejection & Running
special_mechanics.description: Player ejected from bike on crash or stamina depletion. Automatically runs back toward bike but player can alter course with directional buttons or stand still with brake.

special_mechanics.name: Bike Condition Meter
special_mechanics.description: Bike has separate condition meter that decreases on crashes. Fully depleted condition wrecks bike and ends race participation.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Qualitative/empirical data only. Source is Wikipedia gameplay overview with no documented physics values. All precise movement, gravity, and jump parameters are undocumented.
